Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests

Class HeTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerExtensionTests.AbstractReasonerTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensionTests.HeTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
HeL1Tests
public class HeTests extends AbstractReasonerTests
Unit tests for the He reasoner The He and Eh reasoners share the same implementation. This class only has a few integration tests for He. Most tests should be added to EhTests.
